meaning: adj.[植]生长水中的,浸没的,淹没的
examples: It is being named as Flame Moss, most probably due to the growth pattern of the shape of the submersed fronds.
You could see the different growth pattern of the Singapore Moss under submersed condition from the pictures here.
Around 1,000 barrels (42,000 US gallons) of crude have been leaking from the submersed rig each day since it sank last week.
